Why Leaders Hire Lakecia

I've sat where you sit. I know the pressure. And I know what actually works.

🎯

Shipped at Scale

Most AI consultants read about it. I built Azure AI and Intel's silicon-to-software strategy. I know what breaks and what scales.

→ 3x faster time-to-value
💼

Board-Ready

I speak fluent C-suite. No jargon, no hype. Just clear business cases, risk assessments, and ROI projections your board will approve.

→ 100+ board presentations delivered
⚡

Execution Speed

6-month consulting engagements? Not here. I diagnose in days, build roadmaps in weeks, and your team starts executing immediately.

→ 90-day transformation sprints

Services That Drive Results

Clear scope. Clear outcomes. No open-ended retainers.

🎯 AI Strategy Sprint

2-week intensive to assess your AI readiness, identify high-value use cases, and build a 12-month roadmap.

  • Current state assessment
  • Competitive AI positioning
  • Prioritized opportunity map
  • Investment and resource plan
  • Board presentation deck
$25,000 2-week engagement

🏢 Digital Transformation

90-day hands-on partnership to redesign processes, upskill teams, and implement AI across your organization.

  • Process audit and redesign
  • AI tool selection and deployment
  • Team training and enablement
  • Change management support
  • Weekly executive check-ins
$75,000 90-day engagement

👔 Executive Coaching

Monthly 1:1 sessions for CTOs, CIOs, and founders navigating AI transformation. Strategic sounding board + tactical guidance.

  • Monthly strategy sessions
  • Crisis and decision support
  • Board prep and messaging
  • Team structure advice
  • Unlimited Slack access
$5,000/mo 6-month minimum

🎤 Board Advisory

Quarterly board sessions + on-call advisory. Help your board understand AI risks, opportunities, and governance.

  • Quarterly board presentations
  • AI risk assessment
  • Competitive intelligence
  • Vendor evaluation
  • 24-hour response guarantee
$10,000/mo Annual retainer
